seoTitle: West Lakes vs West Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Lakes and West Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Lakes vs West Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lakes and West Range.
heading: West Lakes vs West Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lakes, South Australia and West Range, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lakes and West Range have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is West Lakes or West Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lakes has a flood risk score of 43/100, while West Range scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lakes scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. West Range scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lakes or West Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lakes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
